focus: RCBC (SI #47) D3 confirmed. Two independent derivations. DC#1 AI benchmark saturation. Advancing toward D4.

SI45_CIAP.ontological_types: theoretical (DC#1 game theory), designed empirical (DC#2 adversarial ML), emergent competitive (DC#3 economic markets)
SI45_CIAP.note: Highest-confidence D4 theorem. Meta-theorem: ceiling_TCA and ceiling_GCRSC are CIAP corollaries.

SI47_RCBC.description: RAAI × CIAP conjunction: researchers optimizing training pipelines against fixed benchmarks face CIAP-fails (Goodhart at meta level), while RAAI/AATE ensures trained models cannot introspectively detect benchmark-CA divergence. Double-layer CA-degradation predicts benchmark score inflation while CA stagnates/degrades.
SI47_RCBC.derivation_1: RAAI-DPI × CIAP-fails: double-DPI chain. CA(X) → B_optimized(X) → θ → Î(X) Markov chain. Two chained information inequalities compound.
SI47_RCBC.derivation_2: AATE × CIAP: SDT d-prime instrument degradation path. AATE: d'(n)→0 under OA-feedback training. CIAP-fails: super-linear acceleration of instrument degradation under adaptive optimization pressure. Independent of RAAI-DPI.
SI47_RCBC.dc1: AI benchmark saturation literature: MMLU saturation, BIG-Bench novel vs. known, Chatbot Arena vs. structured tasks, capability overhang pattern — 4 independent evidence programs.
SI47_RCBC.dc2_candidate: STEM education benchmarks / NCLB teaching-to-the-test dynamics (C77 target)
SI47_RCBC.dc3_candidate: Healthcare quality scorecard gaming (hospital reporting under performance metrics)
SI47_RCBC.d4_path: ZR cycle 1 (passive, C76+). Need 2 more DCs (DC#2 education, DC#3 healthcare or social). Need 3 ZR cycles. Target confidence 0.82+.
SI47_RCBC.note: First second-order conjunction theorem in framework — derives from two D4 theorems (RAAI, CIAP/AATE) jointly applied. More empirically specific and falsifiable than first/second-tier theorems.

key_insight_c76: RCBC two-derivation gate cleared in single cycle. Most important structural discovery: D1 (RAAI-DPI × CIAP) and D2 (AATE × CIAP) are both derivation paths to RCBC — AATE × CIAP resolves PRIORITY B (not a separate new theorem, same theorem via different mechanism). RCBC is the framework's first third-tier theorem (derives from two D4 SIs in conjunction). The double-DPI chain shows compounding: CIAP-fails erodes benchmark-CA correlation; RAAI-DPI erodes model introspective access to CA below the already-eroded benchmark. Self-reinforcing absorbing state: benchmark optimization → CA-decoupling → introspective failure → no corrective pressure → continued benchmark optimization.

theorem_tier_structure.tier_2: AIIP, AATE, AAA, KDA, KCRIT, ETD, MCCF, CIAP, RAAI — derived from K1-K7
theorem_tier_structure.tier_3_new: RCBC — derived from two D4 tier-2 theorems (RAAI + CIAP/AATE) in conjunction

passive_accumulation.RAAI_ZR: D4 confirmed — ZR now D4-maintenance mode
passive_accumulation.CIAP_ZR: D4 confirmed — ZR now D4-maintenance mode
